problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Shape. Shape memory alloy phase transition directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
